# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    env:
      NODE_ENV: production
      PIP_CACHE_DIR: ~/.cache/pip
      CONFIG_DIR: .config

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"

      - name: Cache Node dependencies and build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            .next
            dist
            build
            .cache
            ${{ env.CONFIG_DIR }}
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock', 'pnpm-lock.yaml', '.config/**', '.env*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-

      - name: Cache pip packages and Python build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
            __pycache__
            .pytest_cache
            .mypy_cache
            ${{ env.CONFIG_DIR }}
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt', 'requirements/*.txt', 'pyproject.toml', 'poetry.lock', '.config/**', '.env*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
          if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then pip install .; fi

      - name: Build
        run: |
          npm run build --if-present
          python -m pytest --cache-clear --maxfail=1 --disable-warnings -q
